Convoke 8.0 presents

Escape Room

Two steps in. The room locks once. No way out.

The air is wrong. The walls remember. Somewhere in the static, a signal waits for the team that can hear past the noise.

Round 1 Online Quiz 28 March 2026 · 7–9 PM
Round 2 Puzzle Arena 10 April 2026 · 11 AM–2 PM
Round 3 Escape Room 10 April 2026 · 3–6 PM

The veil opens for those who notice what should not be there.

One detail is not decoration. Find it.
